sections.title: When the purple portal becomes vulnerable

lines.speaker: Void Knight
lines.text: The purple, western portal shield is down!

sections.title: When the blue portal becomes vulnerable

lines.speaker: Void Knight
lines.text: The blue, eastern portal shield is down!

sections.title: When the yellow portal becomes vulnerable

lines.speaker: Void Knight
lines.text: The yellow, south-eastern portal shield is down!

sections.title: When the red portal becomes vulnerable

lines.speaker: Void Knight
lines.text: The red, south-western portal shield is down!
